name: Baked Roux
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Place about 1/3 cup of flour in a pie pan or cake pan that has been sprayed with PAM.
3. Bake at 400°F (200°C), stirring frequently, until the roux is caramel colored and begins to have a burnt smell.
4. Do not bake any longer than necessary.
5. Store the roux in the refrigerator.
6. When using the recipe calls for roux, add an equal measure of water to the amount of flour used in the recipe.
